title: cistella cernua
intro: Cistella cernua, also known as the nodding or cistella, is a small, annual herb that belongs to the family Scrophulariaceae. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its expectorant, diuretic, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Cistella cernua include its ability to relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate joint pain. Herbal preparations of Cistella cernua can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
